@graph.name: Litecoin
@graph.description: Litecoin is a peer-to-peer cryptocurrency network based on the Bitcoin protocol, offering faster block times (2.5 minutes) and lower transaction fees.

offers.name: Litecoin Core JSON-RPC API
offers.description: The primary programmatic interface to a Litecoin Core node via JSON-RPC 2.0.

offers.name: Litecoin Core REST API
offers.description: An unauthenticated, read-only HTTP REST interface built into Litecoin Core.

offers.name: Litecoin Space REST API
offers.description: A public REST API for the Litecoin Space block explorer.

offers.name: Litecoin Space WebSocket API
offers.description: A real-time WebSocket API for subscribing to live Litecoin network events.

@graph.name: Litecoin Space REST API
@graph.description: A public REST API provided by the Litecoin Space block explorer for querying the Litecoin network.

@graph.name: Litecoin Core JSON-RPC API
@graph.description: JSON-RPC 2.0 interface to a local Litecoin Core node for blockchain interaction.

@graph.name: Litecoin Space WebSocket API
@graph.description: Real-time WebSocket API for subscribing to live Litecoin network events including blocks, mempool, and address tracking.

@graph.name: Litecoin (LTC)
@graph.description: A decentralized peer-to-peer digital currency with faster block confirmation times and lower transaction fees than Bitcoin.
